sessions.intent: Add Copy/Move/Delete behavior to Path class, make handlers thin delegators

before.assumptions: Path.cs exists with properties only. Handlers have OBP violations (behavior outside owner, !IsFile instead of Exists). IFileSystem from System.IO.Abstractions provides File.Copy, Directory.Move, etc.
before.risk: Low — additive methods on Path, handler simplification. Tests cover both layers.

sessions.plan: 1. Add Copy, Move, Delete methods + EnsureDirectory, CopyDirectory helpers to Path.cs. 2. Simplify copy.cs (add IncludeSubfolders), move.cs, delete.cs (add Recursive) to thin delegators. 3. Add PathTests for new behavior. 4. Update FileHandlerTests for directory operations. 5. Build + test.

actions.context: Added Copy, Move, Delete behavior methods + EnsureDirectory, CopyDirectory private helpers. OBP rule #1: behavior belongs to the owner.
Simplified to thin delegators. Added IncludeSubfolders to copy, Recursive to delete. IgnoreIfNotFound stays in handler (policy, not behavior).
Added 11 tests for Copy/Move/Delete on Path (file + directory variants).
Added 3 handler-level tests for directory copy, move, and recursive delete.

after.health: green — 1210 tests pass, 0 failures, 0 build errors
